MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Continued To Mar-20-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Discovery From Iron Man Moving, Inc. And Kirk Mauer
Off Calendar Sep-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MARK R. MEYER, Esq. of Losch Ehrlich & Meyer (Tel: 415-684-8885) for plaintiffs;
Atty. CANON T. YOUNG, Esq. of Morales, Fierro & Reeves (Tel: 925-288-1776) for defendants James J. Kennedy, III, Patrick Kennedy, and Kennedy Van & Storage, Inc.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JAMES KENNEDY III's Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Discovery From Iron Man Moving, Inc. And Kirk Mauer.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their own behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification, as follows:

To the extent that this motion is a motion to compel various discovery responses, the motion is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff Iron Man Moving, Inc. shall serve verified responses to Defendant James Kennedy III's Requests for Admission, Set One, Form Interrogatories, Set One, and Requests for Production of Documents, Set One, within 14 days of service of entry of this order. Plaintiff Kirk Mauer shall serve code-compliant, verified responses to Defendant James Kennedy III's Requests for Admission, Set One, and Form Interrogatories, Set One, within 14 days of service of entry of this order.

The Court also notes that Defendant's motion impermissibly combines five (5) different discovery motions with different procedural and substantive requirements as to two different parties and violates the filing fee requirements of G.C. Sec. 70617(a)(f). Defendant and counsel are hereby warned against such practice in the future.

The request for sanctions is denied without prejudice for lack of proper notice.

Counsel for defendants to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests And To Compel Production Of Documents; Memorandum In Support
Off Calendar Mar-01-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS IRON MAN MOVING, INC and KIRK MAURER's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests And To Compel Production Of Documents.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion is granted in its entirety other than that sanctions shall only be $750. Defendants James and Patrick Kennedy (hereinafter "defendants") shall allow inspection of the originals in response to Request 2 as they agreed to do in their response. Documents in the possession, custody or control of defendants' attorneys, including without limitation Mr. Skootsky, are deemed to be in the possession, custody or control of defendants. Electronic documents shall be produced in their original electronic form. Defendants shall fully comply with this order by April 1, 2022.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at bruce.highman@highmanlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

No other appearances.
